name: LicenceFlow
description: Manage WooCommerce digital licenses via LicenceFlow REST API. Create, read, update, delete licenses and retrieve statistics.

auth.description: API key from LicenceFlow > Settings > General > MCP API Key

tools.name: list_licenses
tools.description: List licenses with optional filters. Returns paginated results.

status.description: Filter by status: available, sold, active, inactive, expired, returned, redeemed

type.description: Filter by license type: key, account, link, code

search.description: Search by customer name or email

include_key.description: Include decrypted license value in response (default: false)

tools.name: get_license
tools.description: Get a single license by ID.

tools.name: create_license

variation_id.description: WooCommerce variation ID (0 for simple products)

license_key.description: License value (string for key type, object for others)

expiration_date.description: Admin expiry date Y-m-d (not shown to customer)

valid.description: Customer validity in days from purchase date

delivre_x_times.description: Number of times this license can be re-delivered (default: 1)

admin_notes.description: Internal admin notes (never shown to customer)

tools.name: update_license
tools.description: Update one or more fields of an existing license.

tools.name: delete_license
tools.description: Permanently delete a license and its metadata.

tools.name: deliver_license
tools.description: Manually assign and deliver a license to a WooCommerce order.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get license statistics: counts by status and type, top products, low stock alerts, expiring soon, recent deliveries.
